name: icho648-plugin
description: Durable project agent guidance setup and grounded explanation: initialize AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md guidance, or explain a technical object's unique core from a concrete scenario.

interface.shortDescription: Project agent guidance setup and grounded explanation.
interface.longDescription: Two Agent Skills: setup-agent-guidance initializes durable project agent guidance (AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md, ExecPlan, code-review policy); grounded-explainer explains a technical object's unique core from a concrete scenario.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $setup-agent-guidance to initialize project agent guidance, or $grounded-explainer to explain a technical object.
